org.apache.dubbo.rpc

类 RpcConstants

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.dubbo.rpc.RpcConstants
  • 所有已实现的接口:
    CommonConstants, FilterConstants, QosConstants, RegistryConstants, RemotingConstants
    已过时。 
    Replace to org.apache.dubbo.common.Constants

    @Deprecated
public final class RpcConstants
extends Object
implements CommonConstants, QosConstants, FilterConstants, RegistryConstants, RemotingConstants
    RpcConstants
